title: Man charged with making threats against Biden, Harris and Obama
shortDescription: Kyl Alton Hall, 37, was charged with threatening to assassinate President Biden, VP Harris and former President Obama.

title: RFK Jr.'s exit more likely to help Trump than Harris, but how much?
shortDescription: Kennedy voters appear more likely to support Trump than Harris, but their numbers have dwindled while negative views about RFK Jr. have jumped.

title: RFK Jr. suspends campaign and endorses Donald Trump
shortDescription: Robert F. Kennedy Jr., relative of former President John F. Kennedy, has officially suspended his campaign in the 2024 presidential race.

title: No, Trump didn't address wrong state at rally | Fact check
shortDescription: Trump didn't misspeak, he was addressing a group of supporters in the audience who had traveled from North Carolina.

title: RFK Jr. suspends 2024 campaign; endorses former President Trump
shortDescription: Kennedy, the longshot independent candidate, made the announcement following days of speculation.

title: Mary Trump suggests Harris lean into prosecutor background in debate
shortDescription: Donald Trump's niece offers advice to Kamala Harris on how to defeat her uncle in the upcoming debate.

title: Actor Wendell Pierce talks Kamala Harris, 2024 election
shortDescription: Wendell Pierce sat down with USA TODAY's White House correspondent to discuss why he thinks undecided voters may swing for Kamala Harris.

title: Georgia Gov. Brian Kemp endorses Donald Trump after feud
shortDescription: Georgia Gov. Brian Kemp endorsed Donald Trump after the two were at odds for years. The state is a battleground state where Harris is gaining ground.

title: Olivia Troye speaks on time as a Trump staffer
shortDescription: USA TODAY's Joey Garrison sits down with former Mike Pence aide Olivia Troye after her speech at the 2024 Democratic National Convention.

title: 'Underestimated at every turn,' Harris reintroduces herself to voters
shortDescription: Vice President Kamala Harris sought unity in her Democratic nomination speech — and the chance to reinvent herself as she takes on Donald Trump.

title: Launched: Kamala Harris' historic campaign begins with blast at Trump
shortDescription: 33 days ago, she was the running mate on a trailing ticket. Now the vice president is the nominee trying to break the highest, hardest glass ceiling.

title: 'My life's work': Kamala Harris reintroduces herself to voters
shortDescription: Kamala Harris framed the 2024 contest as one in which voters fed up with Republican nominee Donald Trump have a chance to do something in November.

title: RFK Jr. files to withdraw name from Arizona ballot
shortDescription: Kennedy's move came on the eve of an appearance on Friday in Phoenix where he is supposed to make remarks about his "path forward."
